_comment: Tests Sports Therapy by Andy's mandatory duration question before routing, dry needling redirect to massage, and confirmation that no new/existing gate exists for this single-service clinic.

scenarios.name: Generic massage request — must ask duration before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a sports massage with Andy.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Would you prefer 60 or 90 minutes, or would you like to start with a free 15-minute consultation?' as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service without asking duration, or asks a new/existing gate question.

scenarios.name: Dry needling request — must redirect to massage, not route as separate service

history.content: I'd like to book a dry needling session.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks the redirect ('Dry needling is something Andy incorporates into his massage sessions -- would you like to book one?') and waits for a reply. FAIL if agent routes to any confirm_service call, says dry needling is not offered, or asks duration before the redirect.

scenarios.name: Caller states duration upfront — routes directly after duration captured

history.content: I'd like to book a 60-minute sports massage with Andy.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type_id='1222086493015644829', appointment_type='Sports Massage Therapy', variant_type='smt_60'. FAIL if agent asks the duration question again when it was already stated, or speaks any text before the tool call.
